description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, upholstered in a smooth, solid gray fabric. The sofa features three large seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniformly sized. The armrests are straight, low-profile, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a streamlined silhouette. The sofa is supported by slender, metallic legs positioned at the corners, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The upholstery is plain with subtle tufting on the seat cushions, adding a touch of visual interest without overwhelming the minimalist design. This piece is well-suited for contemporary urban environments, offering ample seating and a clean, versatile aesthetic.
description: A modern L-shaped gray sectional sofa with a left chaise, loose cushions, straight padded armrests, and slim metallic legs. The design is minimalist with subtle tufting and a smooth, solid fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, left-facing chaise, three seat and back cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the straight, padded armrest on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniform height of the back and armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the chaise extension and the left armrest profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, uniformly sized seat cushions and three matching back cushions arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout; cushions are plain with subtle tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile, padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest with a minimalist, rectangular profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, metallic legs positioned at the corners, slightly angled and exposed, providing an elevated and modern look.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at a medium height, segmented visually by the three back cushions, with no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and subtle tufting on the seat cushions; no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
